reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저렴하게 잘 구매한것 같아요!!  응가봉투가 귀엽고,, 양도 많아서 당분간 잘 사용할것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I think I got a great deal!! 😊 The poop bags are cute and there's such a large quantity that I think I'll be using them for a while!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 똥봉투 디스펜스에 맞춰 깔맞춤❤️
reviews.content_en: Color-coordinated with my poop bag dispenser ❤️

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
탄탄한 재질이라 찢어질 염려없어서 좋아요ㅎ
사용하기 편하고 가성비좋아요ㅎ
거의 다 써서 재주문합니다~
reviews.content_en: I love that the material is sturdy so there's no worry about tearing ㅎ It's easy to use and great value for money ㅎ I'm almost out so I'm reordering~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
배변봉투 쓰기 편하고 괜찮아서 자주 구매해요~
은은한 향도 나고 튼튼한 편이에요.
생분해도 천천히 된다하니 더 괜찮은 거 같아요~
reviews.content_en: The poop bags are convenient to use and work great, so I buy them often~ They have a subtle scent and feel durable. Since they're biodegradable (even if slowly), that makes them even better~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 두께도 적당해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Sturdy with an appropriate thickness - love it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 은은하게 향이 나서 사용하기 좋아요 튼튼합니다
reviews.content_en: The subtle scent is pleasant to use and they're very durable

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content:
배변봉투는 이것만 사용해요~
너무 얇지않고 색상도 진해서 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: These are the only poop bags I use~ They're not too thin and the dark color is great!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 다른곳보다 저렴하고  사이즈도 넘 크지않아 봉투비닐낭비가 적어 좋네요!!!  재질도 튼튼해서 잘 안찢어져요!
reviews.content_en: Cheaper than other places and the size isn't too big, so there's less plastic waste - awesome!!! The material is durable so they rarely tear!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 가성비 최고 바잇미 배변봉투!! 실외배변 울집 댕댕 산책 필수템이에요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME poop bags - the best value for money!! An absolute must-have for outdoor walks with my pup 🐕

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
한번도 안써본 사람은 있어도 이 풉백 한번쓰면 못벗어나요..!
그게 바로 나. 진짜 짱짱하고 색 진해서 응가안보이고 왕응가 3번까지 담을 수 있어요 진짜 애정함 ㅠ 품절됐을 때 못사서 안절부절 했다구요 !! 두께도 엄청 두껍진않은데 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en: There are people who've never tried them, but once you use this POOP BACK, you can't go back..! That's me. Seriously so durable and the dark color hides the poop really well - can even fit 3 huge poops! Love them so much ㅠ When they were sold out I was so anxious!! The thickness is just right - not too thick but perfect

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 생각보다 두툼하고 절대 안 찢어질듯해요 푸들이라서 봉투가 많이 크지만 향기도 나도 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: Thicker than I expected and doesn't tear at all! Since I have a poodle, I need bigger bags, but I love the scent and quality ^^

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 오마이푸백 절약형 배변봉투 120배
아무리봐도
응가 봉투
바잇미 만한게 없다
은은한 라벤더 향기로 냄새 잡아주고
튼튼한 재질로 무거운 응가도 거뜬
그리고 입구가 쉽게 열려서 편리하다!
역시 바잇미 👍
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME OH MY POO Bag Economy 120 Count
No matter how I look at it
Poop bags
Nothing beats BITE ME
Gentle lavender scent that eliminates odors
Tough material that handles heavy poop with ease
And the opening is easy to use!
BITE ME is the way to go 👍

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 바잇미 노란색만 쓰다가 요거 행사해서 새로 사봤는데 내용물도 잘 안보이고 노란색보다 더 튼튼하고 좋은 것 같아요 적당한 두께와 가겯으로 앞으로 요걸로 배변봉투 정착하려구요
reviews.content_en: I used to only buy BITE ME's yellow bags, but they had a sale on this one so I tried it. The contents don't show through as much and it's sturdier and better quality than the yellow ones. With the right thickness and weight, I'm planning to switch to this for my poop bags going forward

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서는 처음 배변봉투 사보는데 만족스러워요 받고 나서 지금까지 벌써 한 롤은 사용했는데 
전에 쓰던 제품은 earth rated 껀데 이번에 바잇미서 패딩 사다가 풉백 거기꺼 팔면 사야겠다 하고 찾아보다가 바잇미에서 나온 배변봉투가 좀 더 싸길래 반신반의 하면서 사봤어용 노란색도 유명한데 초록색이 좀 더 두툼하고 좋다길래 사봤는데 만족스러워요 일단 두께가 전에 쓰던 것보다 두툼하다고 해야할지 너무 얇닥하지 않아서 찢어질 거 같고 그런건 없더라고용 그리고 두께때문인지 모르겠는데 
똥 냄새가 바깥으로 흘러나오지 않아서 좋은 거 같아요 라벤더 향은 가까이 가야만 맡아지는데 원래는 
배변봉투 풉백에 묶고 다니면 어느정도는 나긴 났거든요 근데 이거는 그런게 없어서 좋네요 
넓직하게 큰 터라 똥 줍기도 편하고 일단 냄새가 새어나오지 않는 게 큰 장점에 두께가 두툼하고 가격이 저렴한 게 장점 같아용 6500원에 120매여서 저는 2팩 샀고 넉넉히 잘 쓸 거 같아요~ 만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying poop bags from BITE ME and I'm really satisfied! I've already used through one whole roll since I received it. I used to use Earth Rated before, and when I got padding from BITE ME I thought I should get their poo bags, so I looked around. BITE ME's poop bags were a bit cheaper so I bought them with some hesitation lol. The yellow is famous but people said the green is thicker and better, so I got that and I'm really satisfied! First of all, the thickness is noticeably thicker than what I used before—it's not too thin so there's no worry about tearing. And maybe because of the thickness, the poop smell doesn't leak out which is great! The lavender scent only smells when you get up close, but when you carry it in the poo bag holder it used to smell a bit, but not with this one! The opening is nice and wide so it's easy to scoop poop, and the big advantage is that there's no smell leaking. The thickness and affordable price are the main perks! At 6,500 won for 120 bags, I bought 2 packs and I think I'll have plenty to use~ I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
마침 떨어져가서 바일미 행사로 샀어요:)
이전에 브랜드꺼 옷 사는김에 사서 사용했는데
너무 얇고 찢어지고 불편했었어요..
후기 보니 튼튼하고 사용감 좋은 후기 많아 선택하는데
도움 되었어요
두꺼운 편이고 짙은 색상에 제가 좋아하는 초록이랑 ㅋ
양도 많고 포장까지 맘에 듭니다
당분간 잘 사용할 것 같아요
다 사용하면 또 사러 올께욥!!^^
reviews.content_en:
It was running out so I bought it on sale at BITE ME :)
I had bought another brand's before and used it
But it was way too thin, kept tearing, and was inconvenient..
After reading reviews with lots of feedback about durability and good usability
It helped me decide to get this
It's on the thicker side and the dark color with the green I like ㅋ
Lots of quantity and even the packaging is great
I think I'll use this well for a while
Once I finish it I'll come buy more!! ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우선 저렴해서 좋구용! 가성비 짱!! 
생분해성분이어서 환경에도 좋으니 더 좋아요. 
다른 봉투는 입구 잡고 열기가 힘들다고 해야하나
미끄러워서 열기가 힘들던데
이 제품은 한번에 개봉 가능해요!! ㅋㅋ
그래서 사용하기 편리해요~ 
근데 애기가 소형견이라 산책 한번 할 때 한 장 쓰면 공간이 많이 남아서 살짝 아깝긴 해요 ㅎㅎ좀 더 작은 사이즈도 나오면 좋겠어요!
reviews.content_en:
First of all, it's cheap and great value!! Best bang for your buck!!
And since it's biodegradable it's good for the environment too.
Other bags are hard to open because you grab the opening but it's slippery
But this product opens in one go!! ㅋㅋ
So it's really convenient to use~
But my baby is a small breed so one bag per walk leaves a lot of empty space which is kinda wasteful hehe. I wish they'd make a smaller size too!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 원래 노란색 봉투 쓰다가 양도 적고 비싸서 초록색으로 처음 구매해봤어요 ! 노란색보다 비닐 입구가 더 잘 열리는 느낌이고 향이 안나서 좋아요 강도는 확실히 노란색이 더 좋은 것 같지만 실외배변하는 강아지라 봉투 사용이 잦아서 앞으로 초록색으로 계속 구매할 것 같아요 :)
reviews.content_en: I used to use the yellow bags but they had less quantity and were expensive, so I tried the green ones for the first time! The opening seems to open more smoothly than the yellow and there's no scent which I like. The durability is definitely better with the yellow ones, but since my dog poops outside frequently and goes through bags quickly, I'll probably keep buying the green ones going forward :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
여러가지 배변봉투를 써봤고 실외배변 강아지를 키우고 있어서 하루 2-3장 사용하고 있는데 이번 배변봉투 정말 마음에 들어요 ! 
제가 3박스째 구매하고 있는데 불량 한번도 나온적 없구 배변봉투 두께도 탄탄해서 너무 좋아요 >_< 
컬러도 흔치않은 컬러라서 더 좋네요 ! 
앞으로도 배변봉투는 이것만 쓸거에요 !!
reviews.content_en:
I've tried several poop bags and I have an outdoor poocher so I use 2-3 bags a day, and I really love this poop bag!
I'm on my 3rd box now and I've never had a single defective one, and the poop bag thickness is really sturdy so it's amazing >_<
I also love the color since it's not a common one!
From now on I'm only using this poop bag!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 주인님이 노란색 보다 초록색이 더 낫데
초록색이 더 넓고 재질도 튼튼하고 찢어질 염려도
없고 라벤더향도 솔솔난다개🐶💚
노란색은 잘 찢어져서...
reviews.content_en:
My owner says the green is better than the yellow
The green is wider, the material is sturdier, there's no risk of tearing,
and it has a nice lavender scent 🐶💚
The yellow ones tear so easily...

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
두께감도 있고 색상도 쨍해서 응가 담아도 안보이고 그림도 귀여워요 바잇미에서 커플템이랑 사며 눈에 띄어서 같이 구매했어요
잘 사용하고 또 구매하러 올께요
reviews.content_en:
It has good thickness and the color is bright so poop doesn't show through and the design is cute too. I saw it paired with couple items at BITE ME and it caught my eye so I bought them together.
I'm using them well and I'll come back to buy more soon!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
똥츄를 드디어 샀네요! 되게 도톰해서 응가 넣어도 티 잘 안나요. 향기가 나는데 아가도 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그리고 그래픽 디자인으로 입구가 표시 되어 있어서 편해요-
똥츄사는 이유가 다 있네요! 다 쓰면 또 살 예정!!
reviews.content_en: I finally bought the poop bag! It's so thick that you can't really tell when there's poop in it. It has a nice scent and my baby likes it too ㅋㅋㅋㅋ And the entrance is marked with graphic design so it's convenient~ There's definitely a reason to buy poop bags! I'm planning to buy it again when I run out!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
올해 9살 접어든 푸들 공주님 모시는 집사임당~😎
하루에 산책을 2번은 무조건 나가는데 
나가면 응가,💩 3번은 기본~ㅋ
다이소에서 구입한 배변봉투는 작고 얇아서 불편했고~
노랑색의 귀여운 배변봉투도 잘 썼었는데 다 쓴줄알고
이번엔 "바잇미 오마이푸백" 제품으로 구입 했어요~
노랑색보다 가격이 저렴해서 좋고~
라벤더 향을 안좋아해서 향기는 별로...
reviews.content_en: I'm a servant to a 9-year-old poodle princess this year~😎 We definitely go out for walks twice a day, and when we do, she poops 3 times at least~ㅋ The poop bags I bought from Daiso were small and thin so they were inconvenient~ I also used the cute yellow poop bags well, but I thought I ran out, so this time I bought the 'BITE ME OH MY POO BAG' product~ It's cheaper than the yellow ones which is great~ But I don't like lavender scent so the smell is not great...

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 사실 아직 산책 못 나가서 사용해보지는 않았지만..! 만져보니 두께도 적당하고! 투명하지도 않아서 좋아욥! 그리고 좋은 냄새가 은은하게 나요! 한 박스 비우고 오겠습니당~
reviews.content_en: Actually I haven't tried using it yet since I haven't been able to go for walks yet..! But touching it, the thickness is just right! And it's not see-through which is great! And it has a nice subtle scent! I'll come back after emptying one box~

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
노란색 친환경 샀었는데 다들 말하다시피
잘 찢어지고 살짝만 잘못 뜯어도 댕강 날라감 ㅎㅎ
그래서 배변패드 사는김에 초록이로 구매
친환경은 아니지만 가격도 더 싸고 빤빤한 재질 : )
똥츄 주머니도 바잇미에서 샀는디 나 바잇미 사랑하네
reviews.content_en: I used to buy the yellow eco-friendly ones, but like everyone says, they tear easily and if you open them even slightly wrong, the bag just flies away ㅎㅎ So I bought the green one when getting poop pads anyway. It's not eco-friendly but the price is cheaper and the material is sturdy : ) I also bought the poop bag from BITE ME and I'm loving BITE ME

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 봉투에서 솔솔 향도 나고 입구도 넓직하고 튼튼해요! 리필용 넉넉히 들어있어서 오래 잘 쓸 거 같아요🤍 꼭 홀더랑 디스펜서랑 같이 구입하셔서 광명 찾으세요!
reviews.content_en: The bags have a subtle scent and the opening is wide and sturdy! The refill comes generously so I think I'll use it well for a long time🤍 Make sure to buy it together with the holder and dispenser to find enlightenment!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
마침 똑 떨어져서 구매했어요 
항상 노란색 생분해제품 구매했었는데 요것도 괜찮네요
귀엽구 가격도 착해서 맘에들어요 잘 쓸게요 :-D
reviews.content_en: It ran out just in time so I bought it. I always bought the yellow biodegradable product but this one is good too. It's cute and affordable so I like it. I'll use it well :-D

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
배변봉투는 처음구매해보는데 너무맘에드는제품이예요
전에는 검은봉투에 휴지챙겨다녀서 냄새가많이났는데
녹색비닐봉투향이있어 냄새도별로안나고 봉투도튼튼하니 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's my first time buying poop bags and I really love this product! Before, I used to carry black bags with tissues so there was a lot of smell, but with the green vinyl bag scent, there's not much smell and the bag is sturdy so it's great!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 원래 검은색만 쓰다가 너무 얇아서 이번에 바잇미꺼로 바꿨어요 딥그린 색상이라 생각보다 비치지 않고 향도 은은하게 나서 좋아요 여러개 더 구매하려고요
reviews.content_en: I used to only use black ones but they were too thin so this time I switched to BITE ME's. The deep green color doesn't show through as much as I thought and the scent is subtle which is nice. I'm planning to buy more!

reviews.name: 줴****
reviews.content: 저희아가 실외배변이라 하루에 여러장쓰는데, 비닐이 도톰하고 발향효과가 있어 배변치울때 불쾌함이없어 늘 쟁이고있어요~ 다쓰면 또 사러올게요
reviews.content_en: My baby goes potty outdoors so we use several bags a day, and since the vinyl is thick and has a scent effect, there's no unpleasantness when cleaning up so I always stock up on it~ I'll come buy more when I run out!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 풉백은 한번 찢어지는 배변봉투에 당한 뒤로 늘 쓰던 얼스 레이티드만 사용하고 있어요! 바이미 쇼핑 중 저렴해서 구매해 봤는데 괜찮네요 예전에 정말 얇은 거 한번 대량으로 사서 사용해 본 적 있는데 기한이 좀 지나니 일년도 안됐나ㅡㅡ 봉투를 벌리기만 해도 찢어지고 난리가 나서 다 버림.. 이 제품은 사용해 보니 느낌상 찢어지지 않을 거 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: After experiencing a poop bag that tears once, I've only been using Earls Rated which I always used! I bought this at BITE ME because it was cheap and it's decent. I remember buying a really thin one in bulk before and after the expiration date passed... it hadn't even been a year and the bag would tear just from opening it and it was a mess so I threw it all away.. This product feels like it won't tear when I use it!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
크린백 투명미니사이즈 한장씩 넣어 다녔는데
사이즈 크네요
냄새도 좋고 사이즈도 꽤 커요
5개 구매했는데 
다음에 또 구매해야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I used to carry CLEAN BAG transparent mini size one at a time, but it's actually quite big! The scent is nice and the size is pretty generous. I bought 5 packs and I'll definitely need to buy more next time.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
세일 할때마다 사서 쓰는 똥츄에요.
일단 안이 안 비치는 진한컬러라 좋고 두꺼워서 찢어질일 없고 오픈이 잘 되요. 친환경 똥츄 중에 세일할때는 이게 최고인것 같아요
reviews.content_en: This is poop bag I buy every time there's a sale. First off, I like that the dark color doesn't show through, it's thick so it won't tear, and it opens really well. Among eco-friendly poop bags, this seems like the best option when it's on sale.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
똑 떨어져서 급히 구매했어요. 빠른 배송이었고 중대형견이 쓰기에 넉넉힌 사이즈라 좋았어요. 
생분해 봉투 쟁이면 찢어지고그래서 그때그때 사서 쓰려고요.
어두운 색이라 안보여서 좋은데, 향은 좀 별로예요. 개취로는.

너무 얇지 않아서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: Ran out suddenly so I bought it in a rush. Fast shipping and the size is generous for medium-large dogs, which was great. Biodegradable bags tend to tear, so I'm planning to buy as needed. I like that the dark color doesn't show anything inside, but the scent isn't really my thing as a dog owner. It's nice that it's not too thin though.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 타사 제품 사용하다가 한번 구매해봣는데 대만족이이요. 냄새도 안새어나오고 두께도 좋아요. 짱짱하고 특히 봉지와 봉지사이 잘 뜯어져요. 대만족중
reviews.content_en: I tried this after using another brand and I'm super satisfied. No odor leakage and great thickness. It's sturdy and especially easy to tear between bags. Really satisfied!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
중형견 두아이 하루두번씩 산책하다보니 봉투가 금방 써져요
제발 응가좀 치우자구요ㅜ
산책하다 다른 댕댕이 응가가 너무 많아 민망해서 제가 치운게 너무 많아요 
같은 반려인끼리 같이 욕먹을짓좀 하지말고 매너있게 키우자구요
비닐도 탄탄하고 색도 너무 튀거나 응가 비치지 않아 좋습니다
사자마자 타임딜 떠서 슬프지만 또 사죠 뭐ㅎ
reviews.content_en: With two medium-sized dogs going on walks twice a day, I go through poop bags quickly. Please pick up after your dogs!! On walks I've ended up picking up so much poop from other dogs because I was embarrassed. Let's be respectful pet owners and not give all dog parents a bad name. The bags are sturdy and the color is dark so it doesn't show the waste - really like that. Sad that a flash sale popped up right after I bought it, but I'll buy again anyway lol 😅

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
첨사봤는데 가격저렴하네요.
생각보다 얇지만 탄탄해서 찢어질거같진않아요.
reviews.content_en: First time trying it and the price is cheap. Thinner than I expected but sturdy enough that I don't think it'll tear.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
다쓰고 재구매했어요.
가격도저렴하고 불량없이 적당히 도톰합니다.
reviews.content_en: Used it all up and repurchased. The price is affordable and it's a decent thickness with no defects.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
가격 저렴하게 잘 샀어요! 향도 솔솔 나네용ㅋ.ㅋ
색상도 진해서 비치지 않을 것 같아요ㅎㅎ수량도 적당하구요ㅋㅋ몇개 더 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: Got a great deal on the price! 😂 The scent comes through nicely too. The dark color doesn't show through either 😄 Good quantity as well lol I'm planning to buy a few more packs!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
어스레이티드 풉백?을 사용했었는데
품절되어서 대체품으로 선택했습니다.
사진과 같이 약간의 비침이 있지만🥲
전에 쓰던것보다 잘 열리고 응가향이 많이 묻혀서 좋네요🫶
reviews.content_en: I used to use an earthrated poop bag, but it was out of stock so I chose this as a replacement. There's a slight show-through compared to the picture 🥲 but it opens much better than what I used before and it holds the poop smell really well 🫶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
여태까지 써온 배변봉투 중에 가장 마음에 들어요.
봉투크기, 색깔, 냄새, 두께 모두 좋아요
계속 구매할것 같아요
reviews.content_en: Out of all the poop bags I've used so far, this is my favorite. Everything about it is great - the bag size, color, scent, and thickness. I'll keep buying this.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 매번 잘 사용하고 있는 배변봉투에요! 저렴한 가격에 튼튼하고 은은한 향도 있어서 마음에 들어요. 무엇보다 비침이 없어서 계속 재구매 중이에요. 가성비 최고최고
reviews.content_en: These poop bags are great and I use them regularly! I love that they're affordable, durable, and have a subtle scent. Most importantly, there's no see-through, so I keep repurchasing them. Best value for money! 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
전에 여기서 귀여운 일러스트 들어간 노란색 봉투를 샀는데 그건 손 잘못 대면 찢어지는 수준이라(근데 아직 팔고 계시더라고요);; 이거로 갈아탔는데 이건 두껍고 튼튼해서 좋아요
천 장 넘게 샀는데 4, 5개월이면 다 쓸 거라 또 왕창 살 듯요
reviews.content_en: I bought yellow bags with cute illustrations from here before, but those were so flimsy they'd tear if you weren't careful (and they're still selling them lol);; I switched to these and they're so much thicker and sturdier. I've bought over 1000 of them and I'll go through them in 4-5 months, so I'll probably bulk buy again soon 😅

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미 똥츄는 입구가 잘 벌어져서 진짜 너무 좋아요! 장갑 낀 상태에서도 잘 벌어지고 은은한 향까지 나서 더더욱요:) 빠른 배송 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME poop bags have openings that spread so easily - I really love them! They open well even with gloves on, and the subtle scent is just the cherry on top :) Thanks for the fast shipping!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 재질도 시중에 판매하는 얇은 제품보다 조금은 두께가 있으며 가장 중요한 건 입구가  잘 열립니다. 무향이 아니여서 우선 한박스만 구매했는데 향도 가까이서 맡아야 나는정도로 은은하여 부담이없네요. 기존 세일이 마무리되어 아쉽네요
reviews.content_en: The material is a bit thicker than the thin products sold elsewhere, and the most important thing is that the opening opens well. Since it's not unscented, I bought just one box first, but the scent is so subtle that you have to get close to smell it, so there's no burden. Too bad the original sale is ending 😢

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 세 마리라서 배변봉투를 너무 금방 써서 항상 욕심인 걸 알아도 많이 사는데 넉넉해서 좋아요 얇은 봉투는 산책하다가 쓰지도 못하고 찢어져서 난감할 때가 많은데 이건 괜찮아요 기존에 사던 것보다 저렴해서 다음에 또 구매할 거예요
reviews.content_en: Since I have three dogs, I go through poop bags super quickly, so even though I know I'm being greedy, I buy a lot - and I appreciate the generous quantity. Thin bags often tear during walks and are a hassle, but these ones are fine. They're cheaper than what I used to buy, so I'll definitely purchase again next time!

reviews.name: 별****
reviews.content: 잘안비치고 입구가 쉽게 잘열려요 봉투도 질기고 좋아요  입구가 어딘지 헤맬때가 있는데  표시가 되있어서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: They don't show through much and the opening opens easily. The bags are durable and great too. Sometimes I can't find where the opening is, but there's a marking so that's helpful! 👍

reviews.name: 부****
reviews.content: 실외배변 멍멍이라 생분해 봉투 유명한 건 다 써봤는데 가격 대비 도톰하고 입구가 잘 열려서 사용하기 편해요 다만 개봉 스티커가 잘 떼어지지 않아 봉투가 찢어지는 게 유일한 단점입니다
reviews.content_en: Since my pup poops outdoors, I've tried all the famous biodegradable bags, and for the price, these are nice and thick with an opening that's easy to use. The only downside is that the opening sticker doesn't come off cleanly and sometimes tears the bag.

reviews.name: 꿀****
reviews.content: 노란 봉투보다 개인적으로 이 제품이 더 마음에 드는건 잘 안찢어지고 색이 어두워서 뒷처리하기 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: I like this product more than the yellow bags personally - they don't tear easily and the dark color makes cleanup easier~ 🙌

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
한번 써본 이후로
계속 재구매하고 있어요
입구가 안열리던가 잘짲어지는 경우가
있는데 요건 그런일이 잘 없더라구요^^
reviews.content_en: After trying them once, I've been repurchasing ever since. Sometimes other bags either don't open well or tear easily, but I rarely have those problems with these ^^ 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노랑색 봉투 쓰다가 좀 더 저렴이가 있어서
사용하던거 마져 쓸 쯤 구입해야지 했는데 품절이었어요
그래서 재입고 알림 기다렸다가 바로 구매했어요!
(재입고 금방되었음!)
확실히 노랑색봉투가 더 부드럽고 좋은 재질 인거같은데
똥봉투가 무슨의미가 있나요!
라벤더향도 은은하고 요 아이도 좋네요
두통구매하길 잘 했어요
reviews.content_en: I was using the yellow bags and found a cheaper option, so I was planning to buy when I finished using the old ones, but they were out of stock 😭 So I waited for the restock alert and bought right away! (Restocked quickly!) The yellow bags are definitely softer and seem like better quality, but what's the point of poop bags lol! The lavender scent is subtle and my pup likes these too. Glad I bought two boxes! 🐕
